meaning: n.三角形,三角琴,(占星术12宫中隔120度的)三宫之一组
examples: The Titans must then step up to face Trigon after he possesses the League and threatens to conquer the world.
Kingsmill Bond at Moscow's Troika Dialog suggests the Baltic company Trigon Agri as a way to play the catch-up story in the Eurasian steppe.
